seo.title: Siru Thoduthalile Song Lyrics Laadam
seo.description: Full Siru Thoduthalile songs lyrics, Laadam Songs Lyrics. sharable lyrics snippets, Lyrics: Yugabharathi, Music: Dharan Kumar, Singer(s): Bombay Jayashree, Haricharan.
seo.keywords: Yugabharathi, Laadam, Dharan Kumar, Bombay Jayashree, Haricharan, Siru Thoduthalile full lyrics, Laadam songs lyrics, Siru Thoduthalile lyrics snippets, Siru Thoduthalile WhatsApp status lyrics snippets, share Siru Thoduthalile lyrics snippets with friends, Tamil lyrics, Tamil songs

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

Siru Thoduthalile expresses the gentle nuances of love and longing, portraying a romantic connection between two individuals.

What is the context of this song in the movie?

In Laadam, the song plays during a pivotal moment that highlights the blossoming romance between the lead characters.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the melodious voices of Bombay Jayashree and Haricharan, with music composed by Dharan Kumar.

When was the song released?

Siru Thoduthalile was released on February 20, 2009.
enrichedMetadata.summary: The song Siru Thoduthalile from Laadam encapsulates the tender emotions of love and affection. It showcases a romantic dialogue between the protagonists, filled with sweet promises and dreams. The soothing melodies and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and warmth, making it perfect for intimate moments. This duet not only highlights the chemistry between the singers but also enhances the narrative of the film, leaving listeners enchanted.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Siru Thoduthalile from the Laadam soundtrack is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love. With the enchanting voices of Bombay Jayashree and Haricharan, this song weaves a tapestry of emotions that resonates deeply. The collaboration of talented lyricist Yugabharathi and music director Dharan Kumar adds a unique charm, making it a must-listen for romantic souls.
stanzaMeanings: In small beginnings, little wings bloom.
In the coming nights, I still listen.
Until this point, I have not gained happiness. In some moments, I am in your love.
I was without knowing myself, my love, why did you give the world a smile like a second mother?
I don't know how to be with you, what I will say will be in a roundabout way.
You have embraced sweetness, opened your heart with grace.
Once love, twice love, many times in life, it is a struggle.
Once together, many times searching in the path.
Once love, twice love, many times in life, it is a struggle.
Like the sea without waves, I was, my love, why did you become a burden and act like a burden?
Like a land without beauty, I waited, my love, you gave yourself completely to me, making me beautiful.
Until now, you are, until now, I am, until now, the sound is in love.
Until now, love is, until now, desire is in the world.
Until now, you are, until now, I am, until now, the sound is in love.
In small beginnings, little wings bloom.
In the coming nights, I still listen.
Until this point, I have not gained happiness. In some moments, I am in your love.
